info.title: Copilot by Umurava API
info.description: An AI Recruiter system that explains, compares, and guides hiring decisions

bearerAuth.name: Authorization
bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>

description.example: We are looking for an experienced developer...

get.description: Checking if the server and other functions are active
Retrieve a specific job posting by ID

post.description: Uses Gemini AI to evaluate and rank all applicants for a job. Automatically fetches applicants from Applications collection, runs AI evaluation, and updates application statuses.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: MongoDB ID of the job to screen applicants for

candidates.reasoning: Strong full-stack background aligns perfectly with job requirements. AWS cert adds value.
Solid backend developer but lacks frontend experience required for this full-stack role.

screening.comparisonSummary: Candidate 1 is the clear top choice with full-stack expertise. Candidate 2 is backend-focused and would need frontend upskilling.

400.description: No applicants found for this job

get.description: Retrieve screenings for a specific job
Retrieve a specific screening by ID
Retrieve all talents or search by name
Retrieve a specific talent by ID

post.description: Sends AI screening results to candidates using 3 modes: selected_only (winner only), all_with_ranking (full details to all), decision_only (positive/decline split)

parameters.name: screeningId
parameters.description: Screening ID to send results for

selectedCandidateId.description: Required for 'selected_only' mode - the winning candidate ID

post.description: Preview the email template for a given mode without sending

get.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen. Use ?role=talent or ?role=admin to specify role.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role to create if new user

get.description: Handles Google OAuth callback and redirects to frontend with token

Create a new user account with email and password
